chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-223 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 25.09.2025 Petitioner Ghulam Nabi Dhamraho, present in person. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh a/w Irfan Hssain, Assistant Accounts Officer and Naeem Solangi, Senior Auditor, District Accounts Office, Larkano. ------ The officers, present, file compliance report alongwith authority letter, taken on record. Per compliance report, the remaining G.P.Fund amounting to Rs.4,89,236/- has been processed and issued on 23.09.2025 vide Pay Roll Slip, annexed with the compliance report, and will be credited in the account of the petitioner on or before 01.10.2025. As far as the remaining amount in respect of commutation arrears, pension, G.P.Fund advance fund are concerned, same have already been paid to the petitioner. Copies whereof are provided to the petitioner, who after going through the same, being satisfied, seeks disposal of instant petition, which is not opposed by other side. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
